creator: elij@wundrd.net
text:
Since there are upgrade concerns (upgrade notes[1]) can prosody 0.9 be =
added under a new port name?
Perhaps something like prosody-devel or prosody-stable?

The 0.8.x series is labeled =93old-stable=94 on the upstream source =
tree[2], and I would really like to use a newer version than 0.8.2 (over =
2 years old now =97 last updated 2011-06-12) if possible.

Thanks.

[1]: https://prosody.im/doc/release/0.9.0
[2]: http://hg.prosody.im=
